# Obfustail
A build-time CSS obfuscation tool for TailwindCSS that transforms readable utility classes into optimized, obfuscated class names.

## Description
Transform your readable Tailwind utility classes into optimized, obfuscated CSS that protects your code, reduces bundle size, and enhances performance.

## Key Features
- **Code Protection**: Hide your styling implementation from competitors
- **Bundle Optimization**: Reduce CSS bundle size with shorter class names
- **Performance Boost**: Faster parsing and improved page load times
- **Build-time Processing**: Automatic obfuscation during the build process
- **Zero Runtime Overhead**: No performance impact on your application

## Quick Start
1. Install dependencies: `npm install uuid && npm install -D glob @types/uuid`
2. Add the obfuscation script to your project
3. Update your build script: `"build": "node scripts/obfuscate-tailwind.js && next build"`
4. Import the generated CSS in your layout

## GitHub Repository
https://github.com/ui-layouts/Obfuscated-tailwindcss
